tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                             Only Girl (In the world) - Rihanna
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: Ofir Ariel
Email: ofirariel@gmail.com

Tuning: standart

I haven't used much thought for the verses and the bridge since they're not very "musical"
It is probably something like the way I wrote it (im talking about the verse and bridge)
but if you have a correction feel free to tell me
now for the chorus I use this barre chords:

[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
e|7----9----7----7------7-----5--|
B|7----10---8----8------8-----7--|
G|7----11---9----7------7-----7--|
D|9----11---9----9------7-----7--|
A|9----9----7---10------10----5--|
E|7------------------------------|[/tab]

If you find these chords too hard, I find this scale very comfortable and easier 
to sing with (chorus chords)

[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  
e|2-----4----2---2----0----0--|
B|2-----5----3---3----3----2--|
G|2-----6----4---2----2----2--|
D|4-----6----4---0----0----2--|
A|4-----4----2-------------0--|
E|2---------------------------|[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
La la la la  x3[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]         
I want you to love me,       like I'm a hot pie[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]         
Keep thinkin' of me,          doin' what you like[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
So boy forget about the world cuz it's gon' be me and you tonight,     yeah[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]F#m[/ch]          
I wanna make your beg for ya, then Im'ma make you swallow your pride,   oh[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
Want you to make me feel like I'm the only girl in the world[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]      
Like I'm the only one that you'll ever love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gadd9[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Like I'm the only one who knows your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gadd9[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Only girl in the world[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
Like I'm the only one that's in command[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause I'm the only one who understands[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    
How to make you feel like a man, yeah[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                                         [ch]F#m[/ch] 
Want you to make me feel like I'm the only girl in the world[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch] 
Like I'm the only one that you'll ever love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     
Like I'm the only one who knows your heart, only one[/tab]

           
Want you to take me,         like a thief in the night
           
Hold me like a pillow,          make me feel right
      
Baby I'll tell you all my secrets that I'm keepin', you can come inside
           
And when you enter, you ain't leavin', be my prisoner for the night,    oh


********************************************
(ALTERNATE SCALE AND CHORDS CHORUS:)
********************************************

Chorus:
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]                                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Want you to make me feel like I'm the only girl in the world[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]       
Like I'm the only one that you'll ever love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Like I'm the only one who knows your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Only girl in the world[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]
Like I'm the only one that's in command[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Cause I'm the only one who understands[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   
Like I'm the only one who knows your heart, only one[/tab]


Bridge:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Take me for a ride, ride, oh baby, take me high, high[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Let me make you first, oh make it last all night[/tab]

***(ALTERNATE VERSION:)***
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
Take me for a ride, ride, oh baby, take me high, high[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch]
Let me make you first, oh make it last all night[/tab]


CHORUS
